mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_TRAFFIC SELECT NULL, CPI.STRIFID, PM.IF_ID, CPI.STRRESID, PM.NODE_ID , CPI.STRTYPEMIN, CPI.INTTIMESTAMP, CPI.INTYEAR, CPI.INTMONTH, CPI.INTDAY , CPI.INTHOUR, CPI.INTMIN, CPI.INTWEEK, CPI.INTBANDWIDTH, CPI.FLTBPSIN , CPI.FLTBPSOUT, CPI.FLTPPSIN, CPI.FLTPPSOUT, CPI.FLTERRORIN, CPI.FLTERROROUT , CPI.FLTDISCARDIN, CPI.FLTDISCARDOUT, CPI.FLTUNKNOWN, CPI.FLTUSAGE, CPI.FLHCINOCTETS , CPI.FLHCOUTOCTETS, CPI.FLHCINUCASTPKTS, CPI.FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS, CPI.FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, CPI.FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS , CPI.FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, CPI.FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, CPI.FLTBPSINMAX, CPI.FLTBPSOUTMAX, CPI.FLTPPSINMAX , CPI.FLTPPSOUTMAX, CPI.FLTERRORINMAX, CPI.FLTERROROUTMAX, CPI.FLTDISCARDINMAX, CPI.FLTDISCARDOUTMAX , CPI.FLTUNKNOWNMAX, CPI.FLTUSAGEMAX FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_PERF_IF CPI LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON CPI.STRIFID = PM.IF_NUM AND CPI.STRRESID = PM.NODE_NUM WHERE CPI.STRIFID = #{strifid} AND CPI.INTTIMESTAMP = #{inttimestamp} ::integer
